rows:
Embrace: 1684           Sire: Sir Henry Colvert

Tribune Lawrence Haroldson is dispatched by Queen Anne to investigate and reinforce the doings of her childe Perkins in LA.  He is prepared to assist him and report to the Queen his true status and situation in the city.  As well he is here to retrieve the book of Ventrue Lineages, the Queen expects that Perkins has retrieved it at this point with more than 3 months elapsing with him in the city.
Concealable Pistol - Incendiary Ammo - 12 shots - 50 step range
